data.title: Nebulized Dexmedetomidine Versus Oral Sumatriptan for Treatment of Post-Dural Puncture Headache Following Caesarian Section (Randomized Comparative Study)
data.brief_summary: comparison between oral sumatriptan and Nebulized Dexmedetomidine in Post Dural Puncture Headache in Cesarean Section
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion criteria:

1. Pregnant female aged between 18 and 40 years old.
2. ASA II and III undergoing elective caesarean section.
3. Diagnosed with Postdural puncture headache with visual analogue score (VAS) ≥ 4 and Lybecker classification score ≥ 2.

Exclusion criteria:

1. Patient refusal.
2. Hi
